title: Linear Deep Integration
goal: Tri-directional status sync between GitHub PRs, Automaker features, and Linear issues with automated project management content generation

milestones.title: GitHub to Linear Status Bridge
milestones.description: Make GitHub PR state visible in Linear as comments and status updates

phases.name: github-pr-event-emitter
phases.title: GitHub PR event emitter
phases.description: Enhance GitHubStateChecker to emit typed events on PR state changes. Track last-known PR state per feature to avoid duplicates. Events: github:pr:review-submitted, github:pr:checks-updated, github:pr:approved, github:pr:changes-requested
acceptanceCriteria: GitHubStateChecker emits events on state changes
Last-known state tracked per feature to prevent duplicate events
Events include PR number, branch, review state, CI status

phases.name: github-to-linear-bridge-service
phases.title: GitHub to Linear bridge service
phases.description: New GitHubLinearBridgeService that subscribes to GitHub PR events and pushes comments/updates to Linear issues. On changes-requested: add comment with reviewer+feedback. On checks-failed: comment with failed checks. On approved: comment noting approval.
acceptanceCriteria: Service subscribes to github:pr:* events
Posts formatted comments to corresponding Linear issues
Includes reviewer name, check names, and actionable details
Graceful skip when feature has no linearIssueId

phases.name: pr-state-sync-crew-member
phases.title: PR state sync crew member
phases.description: New crew member pr-state-sync that runs GitHubStateChecker periodically (every 5 min). Emits events that trigger the bridge.
acceptanceCriteria: Crew member runs on 5-min schedule
Triggers GitHubStateChecker for all registered projects
Emits events on state changes detected

milestones.title: Issue Relations and Dependency Sync
milestones.description: Sync Automaker feature dependencies to Linear issue relations

phases.name: outbound-dependency-to-relation-sync
phases.title: Outbound dependency to relation sync
phases.description: When features have dependencies set, create Linear blocks relations via GraphQL. New method in LinearMCPClient: createIssueRelation(). Hook into set_feature_dependencies and project:scaffolded events.
acceptanceCriteria: LinearMCPClient.createIssueRelation() works
Dependencies synced on feature creation
Duplicate relations detected and skipped

phases.name: inbound-relation-to-dependency-sync
phases.title: Inbound relation to dependency sync
phases.description: When Linear issue relations change via webhook, update Automaker feature dependencies. Poll issueRelations on issue update webhook.
acceptanceCriteria: Issue update webhook checks for relation changes
New relations mapped to Automaker dependencies
Loop prevention for bidirectional sync

phases.name: backfill-copilotkit-dependencies
phases.title: Backfill CopilotKit dependencies
phases.description: One-time endpoint to sync existing Automaker feature dependencies to Linear issue relations for a project.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/linear/sync-dependencies endpoint works
Creates blocks relations in Linear
Reports summary: created, skipped, errors

milestones.title: Project Status and Ceremonies
milestones.description: Automated project updates in Linear with milestone progress tracking

phases.name: project-update-service
phases.title: Project update service
phases.description: New LinearProjectUpdateService that generates and posts status updates to Linear projects. Collects features done/total, PR status, blockers, milestone progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Service generates status update from board state
Posts to Linear via projectUpdateCreate mutation
Includes milestone progress and blockers

phases.name: linear-project-sync-enhancement
phases.title: Linear project sync enhancement
phases.description: Sync project lifecycle: Automaker project status to Linear project status. Track milestone completion percentage.
acceptanceCriteria: Project status changes reflected in Linear
Milestone progress tracked as percentage
Project completion updates Linear to completed

phases.name: ceremony-integration
phases.title: Ceremony integration
phases.description: Connect CeremonyService to LinearProjectUpdateService. Daily standup creates project update. Milestone completion posts summary.
acceptanceCriteria: Daily standup generates Linear project update
Milestone completion posts summary to Linear
Ceremony settings control which updates fire

milestones.title: LangGraph Project Management Flows
milestones.description: LangGraph-powered content generation for project management using antagonistic review

phases.name: project-status-report-flow
phases.title: Project status report flow
phases.description: LangGraph state graph for generating project status reports. Nodes: gatherMetrics, analyzeProgress, generateReport, antagonisticReview, format.
acceptanceCriteria: State graph compiles and runs
Takes project metrics, outputs formatted report
Uses antagonistic review for quality

phases.name: milestone-summary-flow
phases.title: Milestone summary flow
phases.description: LangGraph flow for generating milestone completion summaries. Nodes: collectAchievements, analyzeLessons, draftSummary, antagonisticReview, format.
acceptanceCriteria: Generates compelling milestone summary
Includes lessons learned and next milestone preview
Integrates with LinearProjectUpdateService

phases.name: risk-assessment-flow
phases.title: Risk assessment flow
phases.description: LangGraph flow for identifying project risks. Nodes: checkBlockers, analyzeVelocity, assessRisks, recommend, antagonisticReview.
acceptanceCriteria: Identifies stuck features and velocity trends
Produces actionable risk recommendations
Can be scheduled weekly or triggered on-demand

prd.situation: Automaker has bidirectional Linear sync (feature-issue) with webhook handling and OAuth. CopilotKit project has 39 issues in Linear. GitHub PR state is invisible in Linear.
prd.problem: User wants to see full work lifecycle across GitHub, Automaker, and Linear from Linear. Currently, Linear issues show In Review/Done but nothing in between.
prd.approach: Event-driven tri-directional sync: GitHub PR events to Automaker events to Linear updates. Issue relation sync for dependencies. Automated project status updates via LangGraph flows.
prd.results: From Linear, see exact PR state per issue. See dependency graph. Get automated project status reports.
constraints: No GitHub webhooks - use gh CLI polling
